prompt:
Goal: Create a polished corporate anniversary leadership poster for an automotive company, with a dignified executive portrait and futuristic mobility atmosphere.

Canvas: Wide 16:9 horizontal banner, 1536×864 style composition, pale blue and white gradient background with deep navy accents, premium business-event aesthetic.

Layout: Left side contains the main anniversary typography and slogan; right side contains one middle-aged East Asian male CEO portrait from waist up; the background includes one enormous translucent numeral “10” spanning the center-right with “TH” near the upper right; bottom edge has a dark navy gradient information band with paragraph text and company logos.

Subject details: Show exactly 1 executive: Zhang Yuan, a confident middle-aged East Asian man with short neatly combed salt-and-pepper black hair, rimless glasses, clean-shaven face, calm upward-looking expression, wearing a navy business suit, white dress shirt, blue patterned tie, and small lapel pin. Pose him with arms crossed, body angled slightly left, looking toward the upper left, conveying leadership, stability, and vision.

Background and environment: Use an abstract futuristic highway or test track across the lower half, soft motion lines, faint city skyline silhouettes in the far distance, subtle light beams and lens glow. Add exactly 1 sleek dark blue SUV or sedan driving left-to-right near the lower center-left, slightly motion-blurred. Keep the overall look clean, corporate, and aspirational.

Text content: Use large Chinese headline text on the left: “2016–2026” and “十年同行”. Above it, small text reads “2016-2026  |  十年同行  驭见未来”. Under the headline, add a thin red accent line and Chinese subheading: “某某汽车并购十周年纪念”. Beneath that, include small English text: “10TH ANNIVERSARY OF THE MERGER” and “A DECADE OF PARTNERSHIP, DRIVING THE FUTURE”. On the right beside the portrait, add a red dash accent, then Chinese name and title: “张远” and “董事长 & CEO”, followed by a short Chinese quote: “十年同行，感谢伙伴与用户一路相伴，向新而行。” In the bottom navy band, add a compact Chinese paragraph about the 2016 merger, the 2026 new journey, partnership, innovation, and future travel.

Visible element count: Include exactly 1 executive portrait, exactly 1 car, exactly 1 giant translucent “10”, exactly 1 “TH” mark, exactly 1 main Chinese headline block, exactly 1 right-side CEO name/title block, exactly 1 bottom paragraph block, and exactly 2 company logo marks at the bottom right separated by an “×”.

Branding: At the bottom right, display two clean white automotive-style logos with Chinese/English labels: left logo “某某汽车 / MOUMOU AUTO”, then an “×”, then right logo “某某汽车 / MOUMOU AUTO”.

Visual style: High-end Chinese corporate poster, realistic executive photography blended with elegant graphic design, cool blue color palette, sharp typography, subtle gradients, cinematic lighting, spacious negative space, crisp print-ready finish.

Constraints: Keep all text legible and aligned; do not add extra people, extra vehicles, extra logos, QR codes, watermarks, or decorative clutter. Maintain a formal leadership tone suitable for a 10th anniversary merger commemoration.
